loginError._note: LOGIN ERROR = detect wrong-password / login-fail inline tren login form. Language-agnostic: DOM signals (role/aria/data-testid attributes) + URL markers. KHONG dung text contains().
loginError._strategy: Sau N lan submit van o login form + session khong match item: check DOM signals + URL markers. Neu match -> ket luan WRONG_PASSWORD -> route account error.
loginError._note_disabled_account: Account disabled co URL khac (/checkpoint/828281277713671). Detect rieng qua existing checkpoint flow, KHONG nham voi wrong password.

accountRecovery._note: ACCOUNT_RECOVERY = Forgot Password recovery flow (recover login via email OTP). KHONG phai Change Password. Selector PHAI language-agnostic: uu tien URL pattern + stable attribute (input[name], type, role) + structural (form > input visible). KHONG dung text contains() vi Facebook hien thi nhieu ngon ngu.
accountRecovery._strategy: Resolver thu selectors theo thu tu, filter visible+enabled, prefer cung form chinh. Neu khong match -> tra CONFIG_MISSING/SELECTOR_NOT_FOUND, KHONG click bua.

resendCodeButton._note: Optional. Click khi OTP not arrived sau N phut. Selector chua co stable attribute tren Facebook hien tai - placeholder.

automatedBehaviorVerify._note: Facebook checkpoint 'automated behavior' (Phap: 'comportement automatise'). KHONG dung text - chi URL + form action.

automatedBehaviorIgnoreButton._note: Facebook checkpoint thuong co 2 button: Continue (verify) + Ignore (skip). Selector chinh dua name attr; neu Facebook doi attr -> resolver fallback structural (button thu 2 trong form).

recoverySuccessVerify._note: Verify session recovered = da ve newsfeed/home. Caller verify them c_user cookie + identity match UID.

identityVerify._note: Caller dung Page.Context.CookiesAsync('https://www.facebook.com') + filter c_user. KHONG can selector DOM.

errorVerify._note: Detect loi inline trong form (sai OTP, sai 2FA). KHONG dung text.

changePassword._note: CHANGE_PASSWORD = action dat mat khau moi SAU KHI da login OK. Tach HOAN TOAN khoi accountRecovery. Chi chay khi session alive. Sau success -> update account.Password trong DB. Selector language-agnostic: URL pattern + stable attribute.

settingsPasswordRoute._note: Caller goto direct URL thay vi navigate qua menu (tranh phu thuoc text label menu).

successVerify._note: Verify success = URL khong doi sang error + co toast/alert positive. Caller verify them bang cach thu login lai voi password moi.
